_comment: Tracked in-repo mirror of 4 MA queue rows appended to apex_governance/MISSING_SECRETS.queue.json during ANIM-12. The external queue is outside the code-artifacts git tree; this in-repo audit satisfies the SPEC DoD durability claim (per ANIM-09 round-1 fix pattern).

location_checked: Grep for 'AGEN-WKFL-router' across all 200+ codex_runs transcripts — 0 hits
rows.symptom: No router workflow JSON is inlined anywhere in the codex_runs archive. Router never had its own build-loop directory.
rows.impact: Router runtime cannot be deployed without this. Migration SCRPT alone is insufficient for agent operation.
rows.resolution_required: Operator: (a) locate from prompt registry / X clone snapshots predating May deletion; (b) draft fresh under separate ANIM phase; (c) defer router deployment.

location_checked: Grep for 'AGEN-PRMPT-router' across all 200+ codex_runs transcripts — 0 hits
rows.symptom: No router system prompt inlined anywhere.
rows.impact: Router runtime cannot be deployed without this.
rows.resolution_required: Operator: source from prompt registry / X clone snapshots, draft fresh, or defer.

location_checked: Grep for 'AGEN-SPEC-router' across all 200+ codex_runs transcripts — 0 hits
rows.symptom: No router integration spec inlined anywhere.
rows.impact: Doc-control gap; agent runtime can theoretically operate without it but operator/auditor cannot verify behavior contract.
rows.resolution_required: Operator: source from prompt registry / X clone snapshots, draft fresh, or declare out-of-scope.

location_checked: Grep for 'AGEN-TEST-router' across all 200+ codex_runs transcripts — 0 hits
rows.symptom: No router test plan inlined anywhere.
rows.impact: Router runtime cannot be validated without this; deployment must use ad-hoc smoke tests until the test plan is restored.
rows.resolution_required: Operator: source from prompt registry / X clone snapshots, draft fresh, or defer.
